transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
For today's mukbang
I have Mala tang and Mala Longxia
I'm not good at eating mala
So I asked for it to be less mala
And also, I always drink this beverage when I eat Chinese hot pot
It balances out the spiciness and the mala taste itself very well
So this is what I'll be drinking today
This is like a palm...
Palm somthing
Wait, not palm Coconut drink
Bon appetit
It's sweet and yummy
This is the peanut butter dipping sauce
Mix it up
That's a lot of glass noodles

Mung bean glass noodles
Dip it in the sauce
Tasty
The soup is nice
Spicy
I told them "less spicy" Here's Vienna sausage too
Fishball (minced shrimp or pork meatball) My favorite
This tastes really good
Pun haos should be here somewhere (A type of Chinese noodle)
Here it is
This is the Mala Longxia (Crawfish) The seasoning is very strong
Don't people eat this alive?
Was I supposed to take the shell out?
Let's try it without the shell
How do you eat this tiny thing?
There will be like nothing to eat

Intestines
It's like a mini-lobster
It just comes out like this
That was easy
That's spicy
You can see the intestines here
Beef
Dip it
With the sauce
All the way
This looks like the sweet potato rice cake Isn't it?
I'm right
This is like a mini-king crab
Open it like this
Mala has this really unique taste
The spice

Quail eggs
The color is really white
These crawfish are so small and cute
Take it out like this
That's a struggle
I'm sweating
It has a kick to it
Looks like tofu Doesn't look too appetizing
Nevermind, it's good
That's a strange-looking mushroom Looks gross
Tree ear mushroom
A little bit is okay, but if it's too much...
[Chat: A dish scrub]
Kkwobarou (Sweet & Sour Fried Pork)
They had it I wanted it but I didn't order it
I should've ordered it

It goes perfectly over here
It would've been less spicy if I had the Kkwobarou
Lotus roots
Will this be okay?
I like it braised
Idk about this though
[Chat: That was natural]
I didn't do it on purpose
The meat pulls out with the intestines
But that's literally everything
Don't buy this
That's all there is to eat
It's tasty though
I would order and eat the all-meat ones (picked out)
This is not cool
Spicy

That's really good
But spicy
Another pun haos noodle
I don't talk that much when it's spicy
It's spicy, but it's addicting It's manageable
I figured out how to get the meat out easily
Get it out like this
Crack its back this way
You can see the tail here
You pull it and there you have it
That's fun
Get the tail
In the rest of the soup
I'm going to cook ramyun noodles
Mala Ramyun noodles Incredible
[Chat: Peanut butter dipping sauce noodles]

It saddens me that I only have 1 pot of it
If I have to compare it with the Korean stew Korean stew is better
Tree ear mushroom But I'm not going to eat it
Thanks everyone~
That was good, but it wasn't enough food
